items.caption: Two logos for a cosmetic brand named "cherry." the top logo features the brand name in a stylized, cursive font with a green leaf above the "c" and a red background. the bottom logo presents the brand name in a bold, sans-serif font with a green leaf above the "c" and a black background. both logos are designed to be eye-catching and memorable, with the leaf symbolizing nature and freshness, which is often associated with cosmetics.
